economic_notes: Nation has investment in Wuskwatim Power Limited Partnership (cost method, $179,538,449), NCN Thompson Bus Lines Limited Partnership, NAC NCN Limited Partnership, and various business enterprises including hotels, gas bars, catering, construction, building supplies, restaurant, and high-speed internet.
notes: Audit report signed April 4, 2023 for fiscal year ended March 31, 2021 - significant delay of approximately 2 years in completing audit. Large consolidated entity with 36 fully consolidated subsidiaries and 4 GBEs (NCN Thompson Bus Lines LP, NCN Thompson Bus Ltd., NAC NCN Limited Partnership, NAC NCN GP Ltd.) accounted for by modified equity method. Wuskwatim Power Limited Partnership carried at cost at $179,538,449. Capital construction in progress of $56,593,015 is significant. Long-term debt of $209,293,581 is very large relative to operations. Accumulated surplus on balance sheet is $194,692,093 but statement of changes shows $193,935,448 (difference due to remeasurement gains component). Total government transfers calculated as ISC $83,212,087 + Province of Manitoba $2,346,795 + Manitoba Hydro $1,529,500 + NRHA $849,982 + CMHC $713525 + First Peoples Development Inc $723889 + Economic Climate Change Canada $114196 + MKO $83702 + Grants $96328 = $89,669,004 approximately; deferred revenue movements make precise OSR calculation complex.
